landing.bio: I am an Applied Mathematics Ph.D. student, researching on human cooperation, particularly within hierarchical societies.

experience.aboutWork: Short research stay at Dr. Sergey Gavrilets’ lab in the Ecology and Evolutionary Biology (EEB) Department at UTK. Development of a model involving social norms within hierarchical societies.

Teaching at different levels. Undergraduate level: Linear Algebra to Biomedical Engineering, Industrial Engineering, Telecommunications Engineering, and Data Science and Computation Engineering degrees. Calculus I and II, for Energy Systems Engineering and Electrical Engineering. Other: Introduction to programming with Python and MATLAB.

Member of the Interdisciplinary Group in Complex Systems (GISC in Spanish) and of the Mixed Unit for Complexity and Social Sciences (UMMICS in Spanish). GISC’s twitter account community manager (@giscgroup) since Jan. 2020.
Intern as Laboratory Technician, in charge of manufacturing ad-hoc systems, and repairing circuits and PCBs, using professional (OrCAD) and free software (EAGLE).
Designing, manufacturing and calibration of a metal-cloth characterization system. Industrial systems tasks, maintaining internal network, CRM and sales programs.

education.info: Full scholarship for researching with Angel Sánchez and Alberto Antonioni. Research interests: Complex Systems, Evolutionary Game Theory, Behavioral Economics, Computational Social Systems, Machine Learning.

Full scholarship. Dissertation title: Formation models of hierarchical societies. Modules included: Numerical Methods, Game Theory, Multivariate Statistics, Stochastic Differential Equations, Simulation, Dynamical Systems, Mathematical Biology.

Minor in Electronics and Robotics. Dissertation title: Models for cooperation in dynamical networks with unreliable reputation. Modules included: Control Theory, Algorithms, Software Engineering, Object-Oriented Programming, Computer Systems Modelling, Robotics, Power and Analog Electronics.

interests.paragraphOne: Apart from being a Ph.D. student, I enjoy most of my free time being outdoors. I enjoy biking and hiking.
interests.paragraphTwo: When indoors, I read and sometimes I write. I try to restore old, broken laptops to give them a new life! I also paint, and try to play the guitar and the piano.
